# MetaKeys.ParsedMetaKey constructor

The prefix (with trailing slash) and name parts of a parsed `_meta` key.

```csharp
public ParsedMetaKey(string? Prefix, string Name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Prefix | The prefix including the trailing slash, or `null` when the key has no slash. |
| Name | Everything after the first slash, or the whole key when there is no slash. |
